test.query: SELECT CounterID, max(EventTime) AS m FROM hits_100m_single GROUP BY CounterID ORDER BY m DESC LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null
SELECT CounterID, max(EventTime) AS m FROM hits_100m_single GROUP BY CounterID ORDER BY m DESC LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null SETTINGS optimize_topn_aggregation=1, use_top_k_dynamic_filtering=1
SELECT intHash32(UserID) % 100000 AS k, min(EventTime) AS m FROM hits_100m_single GROUP BY k ORDER BY m ASC LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null
SELECT intHash32(UserID) % 100000 AS k, min(EventTime) AS m FROM hits_100m_single GROUP BY k ORDER BY m ASC LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null SETTINGS optimize_topn_aggregation=1, use_top_k_dynamic_filtering=1
SELECT CounterID, max(EventTime) AS m FROM hits_100m_single GROUP BY CounterID ORDER BY m DESC LIMIT 100 FORMAT Null
SELECT CounterID, max(EventTime) AS m FROM hits_100m_single GROUP BY CounterID ORDER BY m DESC LIMIT 100 FORMAT Null SETTINGS optimize_topn_aggregation=1, use_top_k_dynamic_filtering=1
SELECT RegionID, max(CounterID) AS m FROM hits_100m_single GROUP BY RegionID ORDER BY m DESC LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null
SELECT RegionID, max(CounterID) AS m FROM hits_100m_single GROUP BY RegionID ORDER BY m DESC LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null SETTINGS optimize_topn_aggregation=1
